productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Wirko White Black Shoe
description: A stylish jogging and walking shoe, the puma Wirko is replete with features to enhanced your performance and help you shape up faster with ease. Designed in a low-profile manner, it is created keeping the foot anatomy in mind to make your walks all the more stable and comfortable. Team this with performance clothes whne hitting the track or the gym, or simply pair it with jeans and tees for those casual days.Upper Synthetic leather upper with contrast coloured synthetic overlays on the sides for durability and midfoot support Medial side overlay styled as brand's jumping cat to create a fashion statement Added overlay at the backfoot for durability and support Lace-up system for snug, customised Fit Padded tongue and fabric collar for in-step comfort and snug fit Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort, durability and impact protection Padded footbed for all-day comfort and shock absorption Outsole Durable TPR outsole in herringbone pattern for absolute grip and traction Terraced grooves on the toe region for added grip Mildly vurved forefoot for better traction puma branding and jumping cat as lugs on the midfoot for inner-arch support and grip
